## ProductionTools.useProductionSession() function

Hook for managing production session state.

Provides computed state and actions for a production session including mold selection, frame count, and yield calculation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function useProductionSession(options: IUseProductionSessionOptions): IUseProductionSessionResult;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[IUseProductionSessionOptions](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuseproductionsessionoptions.md)


</td><td>

Hook configuration


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[IUseProductionSessionResult](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuseproductionsessionresult.md)

Object containing state and actions

## Example


```tsx
const { state, actions } = useProductionSession({
  session: currentSession,
  getMold: (id) => runtime?.getRuntimeMold(id).orDefault(undefined),
  onUpdateProduction: (sessionId, production) => updateConfectionProduction(sessionId, production),
  onUpdateLabel: (sessionId, label) => updateSessionLabel(sessionId, label)
});

// Use state
console.log(state.scaledYieldCount); // e.g., 32 pieces

// Use actions
actions.selectMold('mold-001');
actions.setFrames(2);
```
